sentence: Lo cel no està clar avui.
ipa: ˈlo ˈsel ˈno eˈsta ˈkla ˈaβuj
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: North-Western article ⟨lo⟩ [lo] per veny1982; final-⟨r⟩ loss 'clar' [ˈkla] and full atonic vowels (no schwa) per recasens1996.

sentence: Aquesta vesprada plou sobre la ciutat.
ipa: aˈkestɛ βeˈspɾaðɛ ˈplow ˈsoβɾe ˈla siˈwtat
gloss_en: This afternoon it is raining over the city.
notes: Final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'aquesta','vesprada','ciutat'-adjacent (lleidatà lowering) per veny1982; full atonic ⟨e/o⟩ preserved 'sobre' per recasens1996.

sentence: Les cases velles tenen finestres grosses.
ipa: ˈles ˈkazez ˈβeʎes ˈtenen fiˈnestɾez ˈɣɾoses
gloss_en: The old houses have big windows.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'velles' and full atonic vowels 'tenen','finestres' per recasens1996; final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] before vowel (sandhi) per veny1982.

sentence: On està la clau del cotxe?
ipa: ˈon eˈsta ˈla ˈklaw ˈðel ˈkotʃe
gloss_en: Where is the car key?
notes: Full atonic vowels 'on està la','del cotxe' (no reduction) per recasens1996; article ⟨del⟩ [ðel] per veny1982.

sentence: Lo meu germà viu a prop de la plaça.
ipa: ˈlo ˈmew ðʒeˈrma ˈβiw ˈa ˈpɾob ˈde ˈla ˈplasɛ
gloss_en: My brother lives near the square.
notes: Voiced prepalatal ⟨g⟩ realised as affricate [dʒ] 'germà' (North-Western fortition) per veny1982; final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'plaça' [ˈplasɛ] per recasens1996.

sentence: La reunió és demà a les tres.
ipa: ˈla rewniˈo ˈez ðeˈma ˈa ˈles ˈtɾes
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three.
notes: Copula ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'és demà' (sandhi) and full atonic vowels per recasens1996; article ⟨les⟩ per veny1982.

sentence: Vine de seguida i tanca la porta.
ipa: ˈbine ˈðe seˈɣiðɛ ˈi ˈtaŋkɛ ˈla ˈportɛ
gloss_en: Come at once and shut the door.
notes: Final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'seguida','tanca','porta' and velar nasal [ŋ] 'tanca' per veny1982; full stressed vowels per recasens1996.

sentence: Quinze taronges i dotze pomes valen deu euros.
ipa: ˈkinze taˈɾoɲdʒez ˈi ˈðodze ˈpomez ˈβalen ˈdew ˈewɾos
gloss_en: Fifteen oranges and twelve apples cost ten euros.
notes: Voiced affricate ⟨g⟩ [dʒ] 'taronges' [taˈɾoɲdʒez] with palatal nasal [ɲ] per veny1982; voiced ⟨tz/dz⟩ 'dotze' and full atonic ⟨o⟩ 'euros' per recasens1996.

sentence: Lo gos corre per la vora del riu.
ipa: ˈlo ˈɣos ˈkore ˈpe ˈla ˈβoɾɛ ˈðel ˈriw
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩ [lo] and final-⟨r⟩ loss 'per' [ˈpe] per veny1982; trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre' and final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'vora' [ˈβoɾɛ] per recasens1996.

sentence: La dona minja pa amb tomata.
ipa: ˈla ˈðonɛ ˈmiɲdʒɛ ˈpɛ ˈam toˈmatɛ
gloss_en: The woman eats bread with tomato.
notes: Voiced affricate ⟨nj⟩ [ɲdʒ] 'minja' and final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'dona','tomata' per veny1982; ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'pa' [ˈpɛ] before pause per recasens1996.

sentence: Aquell xic jove treballa a la fàbrica.
ipa: aˈkeʎ ˈtʃiɡ ˈdʒoβe tɾeˈβaʎɛ ˈa ˈla ˈfaβɾikɛ
gloss_en: That young lad works at the factory.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'aquell','treballa' and voiced affricate ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'jove' per veny1982; final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'treballa','fàbrica' per recasens1996.

sentence: No crec que faça sol esta setmana.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾek ˈke ˈfasɛ ˈsol ˈestɛ seˈtmanɛ
gloss_en: I do not think it will be sunny this week.
notes: Subjunctive 'faça' and demonstrative 'esta' (North-Western/Valencian isogloss) per veny1982; final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'esta','setmana' per recasens1996.

sentence: La montanya està plena de neu enguany.
ipa: ˈla moˈntaɲɛ eˈsta ˈplenɛ ˈðe ˈnew eˈnɡwaɲ
gloss_en: The mountain is full of snow this year.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ny⟩ [ɲ] 'montanya','enguany' and full atonic vowels per recasens1996; variant 'montanya' per veny1982.

sentence: Los xiquets menuts juguen al pati de l'escola.
ipa: ˈlos tʃiˈkedz meˈnudz ˈðʒuɣen ˈal ˈpati ˈðe leˈskolɛ
gloss_en: The little children play in the schoolyard.
notes: Article ⟨los⟩ [los] and voiced affricate ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'juguen' per veny1982; final ⟨ts⟩ [dz] 'xiquets','menuts' and elision 'de l'escola' per recasens1996.

sentence: Puja les escales i obri la finestra.
ipa: ˈpudʒɛ ˈlez eˈskalez ˈi ˈoβɾi ˈla fiˈnestɾɛ
gloss_en: Go up the stairs and open the window.
notes: Voiced affricate ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'puja' and imperative 'obri' per veny1982; final ⟨s⟩ voiced [z] 'les escales' (sandhi) and final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'finestra' per recasens1996.

sentence: Quanta gent ha vingut a la festa?
ipa: ˈkwantɛ ˈðʒen ˈɛ βiˈnɡut ˈa ˈla ˈfestɛ
gloss_en: How many people have come to the party?
notes: Voiced affricate ⟨g⟩ [dʒ] 'gent' [ˈdʒen] per veny1982; final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'quanta','festa' per recasens1996.

sentence: Lo pont de fusta travessa lo barranc.
ipa: ˈlo ˈpon ˈde ˈfustɛ tɾaˈβesɛ ˈlo βaˈraŋ
gloss_en: The wooden bridge crosses the ravine.
notes: Article ⟨lo⟩ and velar nasal [ŋ] 'barranc' [βaˈraŋ] with final ⟨c⟩ loss per veny1982; final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'fusta','travessa' per recasens1996.

sentence: Sento la pluja caure damunt les teulades.
ipa: ˈsento ˈla ˈpludʒɛ ˈkawɾe ðaˈmun ˈles teˈwlaðes
gloss_en: I hear the rain falling on the roofs.
notes: Voiced affricate ⟨j⟩ [dʒ] 'pluja' and full atonic ⟨o⟩ 'sento' per recasens1996; register 'damunt' per veny1982.

sentence: Bon dia, com va la vida per ací?
ipa: ˈbon ˈdiɛ ˈkom ˈbɛ ˈla ˈβiðɛ ˈpe aˈsi
gloss_en: Good morning, how is life around here?
notes: Final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'dia','vida' and adverb 'ací' per veny1982; final-⟨r⟩ loss 'per' [ˈpe] per recasens1996.

sentence: La meua filla porta un vestit roig.
ipa: ˈla ˈmewɛ ˈfiʎɛ ˈportɛ ˈun beˈstid ˈrotʃ
gloss_en: My daughter is wearing a red dress.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'filla' and adjective 'roig' [ˈrotʃ] per veny1982; possessive 'meua' and final atonic ⟨a⟩→[ɛ] 'filla','porta','fàbrica' per recasens1996.
